mapper.select:
SELECT group.id , group.deleted , group.created_at as createdAt , group.modified_at as modifiedAt , group.group_name as groupName , group.space_id as spaceId
, space.id as spaceId , space.work_name as spaceWorkName , space.space_code as spaceSapceCode FROM group LEFT JOIN space ON group.space_id = space.id WHERE group.id = #{id}
SELECT group.id FROM group WHERE group.id is not null
